---
title: "Displacement Risk Report"
format: html
editor: visual
execute:
  warning: false
---


```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(quarto)
library(knitr)
```



```{r}
#| label: fig-plot
#| fig-cap: "Penguin plot"
#| fig-alt: !expr paste("Scatterplot showing", nrow(palmerpenguins::penguins)"penguins.")

ggplot(palmerpenguins::penguins, aes(x = flipper_length_mm, y = bill_length_mm)) +
  geom_point()
```


```{r setup}

img_path <- "Y:/VISION 2050/Data/Displacement/Displacement Index 2026/docs/Figures/Histograms"
img_fnames <- list.files(img_path, full.names = TRUE)[1:3]
img_alttext <- c("hist01", "hist02", "hist03")

```
![](`r img_fnames[1]`){fig-alt="This is a dynamic value: `r nrow(mtcars)`."}

![](Y:/VISION 2050/Data/Displacement/Displacement Index 2026/docs/Figures/Histograms/01.png)
